prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-SBSBLMCC-WLFGRY Product Type: GUN_SUPPORT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Rifle Rest Shooting Bag Polypropylene Minimalist Lightweight (Gray) Description: MINIMAL SHOOTING BAG

HAND SEWN IN THE USA

Our most minimalist bag with multiple shooting heights. The SCUM BAG provides the same positions as traditional rectangular bags, but we've made this bag flatter and lighter for ease of positioning. Each bag is filled with polypropylene micro-pellets for a lightweight feel and water drainage. We've added an extra tri-hook for easy clip-on for packs and belts.

Features zipper access to the interior of the bag. Easy to refill, add or remove media for customized fit and molding. Search Terms: bean bag rear shooting rest long range rifle accessory precision shooter gear hunting firearms gun accessories field gear flatline Features: - MADE IN USA - The Scum Bag is hand sewn in the USA, ensuring premium quality, authenticity and high performance - MINIMALIST DESIGN - The Scum Bag provides the same positions as traditional rectangular bags but is flatter and lighter for ease of positioning - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made with highly durable, water-resistant Cordura and filled with micro-pellets, the Scum Bag is ultra-lightweight and won't hold water and weigh you down. - EASY TO USE - Featuring zipper access to the interior of the bag, the Scum Bag is easy to refill, add or remove media for customized fit and molding. Comes with an extra tri-hook for easy clip-on for packs and belts - TECH SPECS - Dimensions: 4.5" x 6.5" x 2", Weight: 12oz, Material: 500 Din Cordura, Nylon, Core: Sealed Poly Micro-Pellets === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline Ops Scum Bag Rifle Rest Gray
